title: Credit Edge: Max Uncertainty Meets Max Complacency (Podcast)
summary: Bad software loans will cause credit-market trouble that recalls aspects of the global financial crisis, according to American Century Investments. “We call it max uncertainty with max complacency,” says Paul Norris, referring to tight credit spreads, in this episode of the Credit Edge podcast. “What’s interesting to me is the subprime crisis was very similar,” Norris, who leads the $330 billion asset manager’s securitized markets team, tells Bloomberg News’ James Crombie and Bloomberg Intellige

title: Ambani Says Reliance Evaluating ‘Strategic Pathways’ for Jio, No Word on IPO
summary: Reliance Industries Ltd. is taking “deliberate steps” to strengthen Jio Platforms Ltd.’s governance as it readies for a planned listing of the digital unit that is is expected to fetch as much as $4 billion.

title: Japan Can Step Into FX Market If Volatility, Katayama Reiterates
summary: Japanese Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama reiterated that authorities can step into the foreign exchange market if there’s volatility or evidence of speculative moves, in comments ahead of data expected to confirm authorities intervened at some point during the past month.

title: Asian Stocks Rise on US-Iran Truce Deal, Oil Drops: Markets Wrap
summary: Asian equities advanced and oil dropped after the US and Iran reached a tentative deal to extend their ceasefire.

title: Dollar’s Monthly Rise Leaves Strategists Wary of Further Gains
summary: This month’s rally in the dollar, as traders priced in the prospect of higher US interest rates, is leaving Wall Street strategists wary of further gains.

title: Oil Set for Worst Month Since 2020 as US, Iran to Extend Truce
summary: Oil edged lower after the US and Iran tentatively agreed to extend a ceasefire by 60 days, potentially allowing shipments through the Strait of Hormuz to resume.

title: US, Iran Agree to Truce Renewal Pending Trump Signoff
summary: The US and Iran have reached a tentative deal to extend a ceasefire by 60 days and launch further talks on Tehran’s nuclear program, a person with knowledge of the matter said, raising hopes the three-month conflict could be nearing a resolution. Bloomberg's Laura Davison breaks down what we know. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Holds Gain as US-Iran Truce Hopes Calm Inflation Fears
summary: Gold held a gain after reports that the US and Iran had reached a tentative deal to extend a ceasefire and work toward an agreement to end the Middle East war eased inflation concerns.

title: Tech Frenzy Sparks Shake-Up at China’s Troubled Consumer Funds
summary: China’s battered consumer-focused funds are showing signs of pivoting to tech as a prolonged demand slump forces even the sector’s most committed backers to rethink their strategy.

title: Mitsui & Co. CEO on LNG, AI-driven Energy Demand
summary: Mitsui & Co. CEO says the company is eyeing global expansion in its LNG business amid growing energy demand driven by AI data center buildouts. He spoke exclusively with Bloomberg TV’s Shery Ahn in Tokyo. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jefferies Sued by Fund Investors Alleging Water Firm Fraud
summary: Jefferies Financial Group Inc. has been hit with an investor class action lawsuit over bond purchases made by its 352 Capital fund in a water vending machine firm that federal prosecutors have called a scam.

title: Stocks Hit Record Highs After US-Iran Deal Reports: Markets Wrap
summary: Wall Street traders sent stocks to all-time highs, bonds advanced while a rally in oil waned amid speculation about a diplomatic breakthrough in the three-month war that has rattled global markets.

title: Worthington Steel Raises $1.4 Billion for Klöeckner Takeover
summary: Worthington Steel Inc. raised $1.4 billion in the leveraged-finance market Thursday to help fund its acquisition of German metals company Klöeckner & Co SE.

title: Drugmaker Apotex Files for Canada IPO Showing Revenue Jump
summary: Canadian generic drugmaker Apotex Health Corp. filed for an initial public offering in Toronto, it said in a statement on Thursday.

title: Can the OpenAI and Anthropic IPOs Live Up to Expectations?
summary: The AI dynamos are eyeing the public markets, but some wonder whether SpaceX’s planned June listing will steal their thunder.

title: Five Charts That Show Rising Yields Reshaping Japanese Markets
summary: Japan’s financial markets have entered a new phase in which rising bond yields no longer signal just the healthy normalization of monetary policy, but also the risk that inflation may increase too much.

title: Bitcoin Dips Below $73,000 Despite Trump’s Crypto Capital Push
summary: Bitcoin briefly fell below $73,000 despite a fresh push from Donald Trump for the CLARITY Act, suggesting pro-crypto messaging from  Washington is losing its ability to drive gains in digital assets.

title: Former LVMH Chair Brown Discusses K-Shaped Recovery Within Luxury Sector
summary: Pauline Brown, former chair of LVMH North America, joined the discussion to analyze the ongoing k-shaped economic recovery, particularly within the luxury retail sector. She highlighted that even among luxury brands, performance is diverging significantly. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hormel Foods Shares Rise on Strong Q2 Earnings
summary: Hormel Foods reported adjusted earnings per share and organic sales for the second quarter that exceeded analyst expectations, driving a notable increase in its stock price. John Ghingo, President of Hormel Foods, discussed the company's ongoing turnaround plan and its positive impact on results. He speaks with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Test Your ETF Knowledge In Our IQ Test
summary: Bloomberg's Joel Weber puts Katie Greifeld and Eric Balchunas to the test on "Bloomberg ETF IQ" in this week's edition of "IQ Test." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Veja os Três Assuntos Que Marcaram a Semana no Brasil
summary:
O repórter Daniel Carvalho conta quais foram os assuntos de destaque na semana no Brasil. Com produção de Beatriz Reis e Patrícia Xavier, edição de Bárbara Nascimento.

Original filename: video 29 maio.mp4 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Jr.-Backed Drone Stock Soars 57% on US Funding Hopes
summary: Shares of drone makers and suppliers rallied Thursday after a report said the Trump administration is exploring potential funding deals with a group of companies to increase domestic production and lower costs.

title: US Stocks Hit Records on Iran Deal Report as Oil Pares Gains
summary: Stocks climbed to fresh records Thursday after reports of a deal between the US and Iran fanned optimism that the conflict is inching toward an end.

title: Dollar Falls Against Major Peers on Report of US-Iran Deal
summary: The dollar fell against all of its major peers after a report that the US and Iran reached an agreement to extend a ceasefire, pending the approval of President Donald Trump.

title: Zscaler CEO: Anthropic's Mythos Has Added 'Fuel to the Fire'
summary: Zscaler CEO Jay Chaudry expects says the company's track record is 'very good' when it comes to revenue, and that Anthropic's Mythos has added 'fuel to the fire' on cybersecurity.. The security software company gave a fourth-quarter revenue forecast earlier this week that was weaker than expected. Evercore downgrades the stock, noting slowing net new customers.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Treasuries Rise as Optimism for US-Iran Deal Trims Oil Prices
summary: Treasuries rose after reports that the US and Iran reached an agreement to extend a truce and work toward ending a three-month war that’s ignited an oil-driven surge in inflation.

title: Gold Rises as Reports of US-Iran Deal Eases Bets on Higher Rates
summary: Gold rose after reports that Iran and the US reached a tentative deal to extend a ceasefire and work toward an agreement to end the Middle East war, pending final approval from US President Donald Trump.

title: FTC Chair Ferguson Says Agency Probing Fertilizer Industry
summary: The Federal Trade Commission recently launched an antitrust investigation into the rising costs of fertilizer in the US, the agency’s head said at an event in Texas on Thursday.

title: Oil Prices Steady as Traders Assess US-Iran Truce Reports
summary: Oil prices were little changed after a volatile trading day as traders digested news that the US and Iran have reached a tentative deal to extend a ceasefire and work toward a pact to end the war.

title: SpaceX Fever Accelerates Space ETFs, Weakness In Crypto ETF Flows | ETF IQ 5/28/2026
summary: "Bloomberg ETF IQ" focuses on the opportunities, risks and current trends tied to the trillions of dollars in the global exchange traded funds industry. Today's guests: Strategas ETF Strategist Todd Sohn, TMX VettaFi Head of Sector & Industry Research Roxanna Islam, AdvisorShares CIO & Portfolio Manager Dan Ahrens, and PIMCO Head of Leveraged Finance David Forgash. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Canada Fintechs Wealthsimple, Questrade to Offer Pre-IPO Access
summary: Canadian online brokerages Wealthsimple and Questrade Inc. are joining a wave of companies promising to offer access to firms planning initial public offerings, as startup funding rounds heat up.
